visa_types.name: Private Visit
visa_types.documents_required:
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/idn/en/bgr/travel-insurance).
Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/48ejoYrQXU0XosXgPPaAin/abde635aba9fbba9cef764b8af8813f1/bulgaria-document-checklist.pdf)
Note: Please provide invitation declaration issued by Bulgarian Immigration along with the invitation letter from the invitee.
visa_types.visa_fees:
The Visa Fees are as follows:

[Table:   Private Visit]
Kindly be informed that Applicant need to pay the VISA Fee (in EURO)  to Bulgaria Embassy Bank Account before lodging the application to VFS.
Please pay the visa fee individually/per applicant.
Service Fee: IDR 615.000
Please mention your full name, passport number, and visa type (Visa C) on the bank slip when you pay to the Embassy bank account.
Please make sure you pay the Visa Fee to the correct Bank Account (exact amount 90 EURO)
Please bring the Original Bank Transfer Receipt with you when you come to apply.
Embassy bank account details:
Embassy of the Republic of Bulgaria
Jalan Imam Bonjol 34-36 Menteng, Jakarta Pusat 10310
Bank : CIMB NIAGA
Bank Address : Jl. Hos Cokroaminoto no.81 Jakarta Pusat.10310
Account Number : 800138027030 Euro
CIF : 111500000391765
SWIFT : BNIAIDJA
visa_types.processing_time: Each application my take an around 15 working days excluding the day of submission
visa_types.forms:
Application form in English  (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1VsrRF4reLkN0MXh4Kna5t/983240ff95669e81e262e9a8c8c4659d/visa-application-form-en.pdf)

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
For further information, please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/TWPpi63hO5eQM7s0bFBPA/0fb0ed1d190a88aa76b7c3b4b7fc2c4f/BG-VISA-C.pdf)

## Visa Fees
The Visa Fees are as follows:

[Table:   Private Visit]
Kindly be informed that Applicant need to pay the VISA Fee (in EURO)  to Bulgaria Embassy Bank Account before lodging the application to VFS.
Please pay the visa fee individually/per applicant.
Service Fee: IDR 615.000
Please mention your full name, passport number, and visa type (Visa C) on the bank slip when you pay to the Embassy bank account.
Please make sure you pay the Visa Fee to the correct Bank Account (exact amount 90 EURO)
Please bring the Original Bank Transfer Receipt with you when you come to apply.
Embassy bank account details:
Embassy of the Republic of Bulgaria
Jalan Imam Bonjol 34-36 Menteng, Jakarta Pusat 10310
Bank : CIMB NIAGA
Bank Address : Jl. Hos Cokroaminoto no.81 Jakarta Pusat.10310
Account Number : 800138027030 Euro
CIF : 111500000391765
SWIFT : BNIAIDJA

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/idn/en/bgr/travel-insurance).
Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/48ejoYrQXU0XosXgPPaAin/abde635aba9fbba9cef764b8af8813f1/bulgaria-document-checklist.pdf)
Note: Please provide invitation declaration issued by Bulgarian Immigration along with the invitation letter from the invitee.

## Required Photo
A colorful photograph 3,5 cm x 4,5 cm against light colored background-passport format / the face must take up to 70-80% of the photo / photos with dark glasses or non-professional photos are not accepted;

## Processing Time
Each application my take an around 15 working days excluding the day of submission

## Download Forms
Application form in English  (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1VsrRF4reLkN0MXh4Kna5t/983240ff95669e81e262e9a8c8c4659d/visa-application-form-en.pdf)

visa_types.name: Airport Transit Visa
visa_types.documents_required:
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/idn/en/bgr/travel-insurance).
Documents to be submitted on applying for a type “A” visa
The following documents shall be submitted together with the application on applying for an airport transit visa:
- A regular foreign travel document;
- A photocopy of the pages the foreign travel document with the personal information and with the visas laid and/or a photocopy of the held permits for stay in the next states along the route as well as for the end destination state, if required.
- A recent colorful photograph (passport size)
- Flight booking
Before the airport transit visa is issued, the ticket and a copy thereof are presented
There are additional requirements for the other types of visas.

Please pay the visa fee individually/per applicant.

Please mention your full name, passport number, and visa type (Visa C) on the bank slip when you pay to the Embassy bank account.
Please make sure you pay the Visa Fee to the correct Bank Account (exact amount 90 EURO)

Kindly be informed that Applicant need to pay the VISA Fee (in EURO)  to Bulgaria Embassy Bank Account before lodging the application to VFS.
Please pay the visa fee individually/per applicant.
Please mention your family name, passport number, and visa type (Visa C or Visa D) on the bank slip when you pay to the Embassy bank account.
Service Fee: IDR 615.000
Please mention your full name, passport number, and visa type (Visa C) on the bank slip when you pay to the Embassy bank account.
Please make sure you pay the Visa Fee to the correct Bank Account (exact amount 90 EURO)
Please bring the Original Bank Transfer Receipt with you when you come to apply.
Embassy bank account details:
Embassy of the Republic of Bulgaria
Jalan Imam Bonjol 34-36 Menteng, Jakarta Pusat 10310
Bank : CIMB NIAGA
Bank Address : Jl. Hos Cokroaminoto no.81 Jakarta Pusat.10310
Account Number : 800138027030 Euro
CIF : 111500000391765
SWIFT : BNIAIDJA

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/idn/en/bgr/travel-insurance).
Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/48ejoYrQXU0XosXgPPaAin/abde635aba9fbba9cef764b8af8813f1/bulgaria-document-checklist.pdf)

## Required Photo
A colorful photograph 3,5 cm x 4,5 cm against light colored background-passport format / the face must take up to 70-80% of the photo / photos with dark glasses or non-professional photos are not accepted;

## Processing Time
Each application my take an around 15 working days excluding the day of submission

## Download Forms
Application form in English  (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1VsrRF4reLkN0MXh4Kna5t/983240ff95669e81e262e9a8c8c4659d/visa-application-form-en.pdf)
